title: Cinematic National Football Hero Double Exposure Poster AI
sourceTitle: Cinematic National Football Hero Double Exposure Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Cinematic national hero football poster for PORTUGAL NUMBER SEVEN and PORTUGAL, built around a massive double-exposure silhouette. Subject: PORTUGAL NUMBER SEVEN wears a national-inspired football jersey with iconic number 7 visible on the jersey, looking confidently toward the horizon while the body transforms into a panoramic national landscape. Scene: Lisbon skyline, ocean cliffs, tiled streets, bridges, historic architecture, and glowing national stadium blends with illuminated streets, monuments, rivers, mountains, cultural symbols, and a packed glowing football stadium beneath the player silhouette. Composition: Fixed ultra-realistic vertical hero poster: large football-player portrait, double-exposure country panorama inside body, golden cinematic sky, crest-like emblem, subtle autograph effect, and title typography for PORTUGAL NUMBER SEVEN / PORTUGAL. Signature Elements: Preserved cinematic national football hero double exposure poster source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Epic sports legacy storytelling, ultra-realistic national hero poster, cinematic travel panorama, emotional patriotic atmosphere, rich color grading, and premium football campaign finish. Color Palette: Fixed warm golden-hour sunset, national team colors, glowing city lights, stadium greens, atmospheric blue shadows, and rich cinematic contrast. Lighting: Dramatic sunset light, volumetric rays, glowing stadium, atmospheric haze, cinematic sky, and face rim highlights. Restrictions: Keep one coherent football hero, invented identity where needed, readable typography, credible double-exposure silhouette, coherent national panorama, clean crest-like details, balanced landmarks, rich cinematic lighting, and premium sports-poster finish.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
